examples: When I was 11 my mother sent me to elocution lessons.
What do you teach? -speech, elocution and poise.
All her elocution lessons were just a mask. She was a chiseler from the day she was born.
The first 12 Off by Heart finalists had neither the unsettling precociousness of spelling bee champions, nor much whiff of an elocution lesson.
IBM's electronic-elocution lessons will prove to be.
